name: Hushward Rod
sigNote: SHELVED 2026-06-10 (code dormant, config removed): SIGNATURE "Unbroken Chant" (support grant, Signatures/GrowthEngine HoldSignature path) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3 the wielder gains Swiftspell (support 226, +0x98 byte 3 mask 0x08), OR-set + held each tick; stacks with the player's own support pick; released (AND-cleared) if the rod leaves the wielder's hands mid-battle, never stripping a player-picked Swiftspell. Halved spell charge time deepens the anti-Silence identity. p3Desc: 'Grants Swiftspell: the wielder casts in half the usual time.' OPEN LIVE QUESTION: Swiftspell as a LIVE-held bit is unverified — charge time is computed at cast-queue so it should work (it is NOT in the IsBuildTimeOnly set); the GRANT read-back log + one timed cast settles it. Replaces the DRAFT triple stack (invalid multi-grant style).

name: Umbral Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Spiritual Font" (runtime-written restore, SpiritualFont.cs) — MOVED from Wellspring Rod (id 51, tier 1) 2026-06-10: T1 weapons carry no signatures. TRIGGER: the actor latch (KillTracker.LastPlayerWeapons) rising edge for weapon id 56 (absent -> present). KNOWN GAP: a move-only turn raises no latch; movement credited at the NEXT action edge (delta accumulates) -- late, never lost. TWIN WRITE-THROUGH: Wielder.LocateAll + ReplenishAll write to every located twin (live copy + frozen band copies) -- idempotent, so the authoritative copy always takes effect; the (0,0)-corner case is covered. At each wielder ACTION EDGE where gx/gy changed since the previous edge (first edge only snapshots), write HP += round(maxHP*10%) (LifeSap.NewHp: floor 1, clamp, NEVER revive) and MP += round(maxMP*10%) (floor 1, clamp; never into a corpse). MP pair band +0x18/+0x1A LIVE-VERIFIED on screen 2026-06-10; per-battle layout validation (>= 2 valid band units, mp <= maxMp, maxMp <= 999, maxMp >= 1 for at least one) kept as a per-battle sanity guard. Post-write SET/MISS read-back still logged. Knobs: Tuning.FontHpPct/FontMpPct = 0.10. p3Desc: 'Moving restores the wielder's HP and MP.' SHELVED on this row: Life Sap (LifeSap.cs) is dormant (code exists, config removed 2026-06-10) and needs a new home if revived -- see branch shelved-rod-signatures.

name: Dragon Rod
sigNote: SHELVED 2026-06-10 (code dormant, config removed): SIGNATURE "Wyrmblood" (customRuntime, Wyrmblood.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, at each wielder COMPLETED-turn edge (TurnTracker rising-Acted: the heal lands as the wielder finishes acting, adjacency from the post-move tile — not pre-move like vanilla Regen), the wielder AND every ALLY within 1 Manhattan tile heal their OWN maxHP/8 (Tuning.WyrmbloodDiv = vanilla Regen rate), clamped at full. EMULATED regen — the Regen status bit is unmapped, never touched; guarded HP writes on the authoritative band entries. Allies positively identified (static-array player-slot fingerprints — never enemies); dead never healed; one heal per fingerprint per splash. Each splash dev-logged. p3Desc: 'The wielder regenerates each turn, and the warmth mends adjacent allies.' Name 'Dragonheart' FORBIDDEN (Dragoon reaction collision). Replaces the DRAFT Regenerate stack with the same fantasy in buildable form.

name: Rod of Faith
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Rapture" (customRuntime, Rapture.cs) — REWORKED 2026-06-10: the 3-turn cap is RETIRED (the band CT it read, +0x25 = ExtraTurn's WRITE target, never ticked live; recovery release player-verified same session). Now: when the +3 wielder's HP drops below 30% of max (Tuning.RaptureHpPct), Master Teleportation (movement 243 = ability.en key 499; Tuning.RaptureMoveId) REPLACES the movement field (band +0x80, 3 bytes) and is HELD UNTIL THE WIELDER RECOVERS to/above the threshold — no turn count. Recovery IS the hysteresis: the next drop below threshold arms a fresh window. Maim's save-once/hold/restore discipline + never-re-save invariant intact. Restores on unequip/tier loss/wielder death (3-tick streak)/battle exit. DUAL-WIELD: no other movement-bit writer exists (the Wellspring font bits were retired for runtime writes), so the held image carries only the teleport bit. MOVEMENT 243 CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-06-10: player teleported; FULL SIGNATURE PLAYER-VERIFIED ('works flawlessly') same session; arm-time read-back (SET/MISS) still logged; fallback: flip RaptureMoveId to 242. p3Desc: 'Below a third health, the wielder gains Master Teleportation until they recover.' The glass cannon's escape hatch — holds as long as the crisis holds.
